info.title: CommCare HQ API
info.description: CommCare HQ REST API provides access to mobile data collection platform resources including cases, forms, users, groups, applications, locations, fixtures/lookup tables, reports, OData feeds, messaging events, and domain metadata. The API uses Tastypie-based resources with list and detail endpoints, supporting JSON format with API key or session authentication.

get.description: CommCare cases - the primary data model
Retrieve a specific case by ID
CommCare cases - the primary data model (v2 API endpoint)

post.description: Create or update a case. POST with case properties to create, or include case_id to update.
